name: divergence_connect_drain_on_sigterm
description: Open CONNECT tunnel to egress-target, trickle bytes, SIGTERM both sidecars. Go closes immediately (no drain). Rust drains for up to 5s per main.rs SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT. THIS CASE KILLS THE CONTAINERS — must run last.

divergence.description: Rust gracefully drains long-lived CONNECT tunnels on SIGTERM; Go closes listeners immediately.
divergence.rust_expected: 1900 <= drain_ms <= 5500 (slow drain bounded by FR-27 SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT; spec 2000-5000ms +/- CI tolerance)
